notes: Canonical striatal D1 SPN markers (v6 list). Drd1 = Drd1a alias.
Canonical striatal D2 SPN markers (v6 list). Sp9 KEY for D2 lineage.
Patch/striosome markers (v6 list). Oprm1 (mu-opioid) KEY enrichment in patch (Crittenden & Graybiel 2011).
Matrix/exopatch markers (v6 list). Calb1+ Wfs1+ identifies matrix; lower Pdyn than patch.
ChAT-positive striatal interneurons (v6 list).
Striatal PV/SST/NPY/NOS interneurons (v6 list). Tepper 2010 review.

cell_type_label: Posterior BMA glutamatergic / pallial amygdala VGLUT1
notes: VGLUT1 (Slc17a7+) BMA/pallial amygdala glutamatergic (v6 list). Gpr101 = amygdala-enriched orphan GPCR.
VGLUT2 (Slc17a6+) BMA/MEA boundary glutamatergic (v6 list). Border population - spatially validate.

sAMY-like striatal-style inhibitory NEIGHBORS (v6 list). NOT a BMAp target - use as CONTAMINATION/EXCLUSION control. BMAp != sAMY in Allen ontology. Striatum-like markers (Ppp1r1b/Gpr88/Foxp2/Penk) appear here but in sAMY-like neighboring populations not BMAp itself.

RE-specific markers (v8 refined to prioritize Nox4 = Allen WMB subclass-defining marker for 152 RE-Xi Nox4 Glut). Calb2 = Phillips 2019 Nat Neurosci confirmed RE marker. Spon1 = retained v6 marker. Removed Adcyap1/Nts from positive set (also in MG/auditory) - moved to exclusion. Exclusion = Prkcd/Grin2c (151 TH Prkcd Grin2c = broader midline), Tnnt1/Necab1 (Phillips 2019: lateral thalamic, NOT RE), Nts (also strong in MG-POL-SGN auditory thalamic), Pou4f1/Sox1 (LH lateral habenula), Sp9 (SPA subparafascicular).
Reticular thalamus (RT/ZI) GABA EXCLUSION (v6 list). Pvalb+ Sox14+ Dlx1/2+ = RT-derived inhibitory cells; use as exclusion control to confirm RE probes are NOT picking up RT/ZI.

Lateral mammillary specific markers. Pitx2 = key TF for LM/PH/SUM lineage, distinguishes from MMN (Sagner et al 2025 PMC12302022). Foxa1+Lmx1a = SMN/PH-related lineage TFs. Nr4a2 = retained LM marker. Tac2 retained but lower priority (also in ARH). Exclusion = Foxb1/Lhx1/Lhx5/Uncx/Nhlh2/Nkx2-4 = MMN-specific TFs (Sagner 2025). Pnoc/Npy/Nts/Cartpt = MMN-specific neuropeptides (Sagner 2025 - they reciprocally repress SMN markers). Tbx3 = ARH-PVp marker (excludes arcuate). Pomc/Avp/Otp = ARH/PVH excluders. Removed Prlr/Esr1/Kcnc2 (broader hypothalamic, not LM-specific).

Neighboring hypothalamic EXCLUSION populations (medial mammillary + ARH + AHN/LHA). MMN-medial: Foxb1+ Lhx1/5+ Uncx+ Nhlh2+ Pnoc+ Npy+ Nts+ Cartpt+ Cck+ (Sagner 2025). ARH/PVH: Pomc+ Avp+ Otp+ Tbx3+. AHN/RCH/LHA: Otp+ Fezf1+ Gsx1+. Use as control to confirm LM probes are NOT picking up these populations.
Cortical L2/3 IT canonical markers (v6 list).

cell_type_label: L5 IT / L5 ET/PT output neurons
notes: L5 IT and L5 ET (PT) output neuron markers (v6 list). Fezf2 KEY for ET/PT lineage.
L6 CT (Foxp2+ Tle4+ Ntsr1+) and L6b (Ctgf/Ccn2+ Cplx3+ Nxph4+) markers (v6 list).
Cortical PV/SST/VIP/LAMP5/SNCG interneurons (v6 list). Tasic 2018 / Yao 2021.
Insula L2/3-L4 upper-layer IT markers (v6 list).
Insula L5 ET (Fezf2+) and L6 CT (Tle4+ Foxp2+ Ntsr1+) deep-layer output markers (v6 list).
Insular PV/SST/VIP/LAMP5/SNCG interneurons (v6 list).
CA1 pyramidal canonical (Cembrowski 2016/2018 hippocampal atlas).
CA2 KEY markers Rgs14/Amigo2/Avpr1b (Hitti & Siegelbaum 2014).
CA3 pyramidal canonical (Cembrowski 2016).
Dentate gyrus granule cells (Prox1 KEY marker).
